This is Public Review before v0.1.0 Public Preview. Xtrape Capsule is not
production-ready yet.

Reference links:

- Public site: https://xtrape-com.github.io/xtrape-capsule-site/
- CE repository: https://github.com/xtrape-com/xtrape-capsule-ce
- Agent SDK: https://github.com/xtrape-com/xtrape-capsule-agent-node
- Contracts package: https://github.com/xtrape-com/xtrape-capsule-contracts-node

## Review area

<!-- CE, Agent SDK, Contracts, Site/docs, Quick Start, deployment, security, API design. -->

## Review questions

- Can you understand what Xtrape Capsule is within 30 seconds?
- Does the Capsule Service concept make sense?
- Can you follow the Quick Start?
- Is Agent registration clear?
- Is the security boundary acceptable?
- What would block you from trying it?
- Which use case should be prioritized?

## Feedback

<!-- What should be corrected, clarified, simplified, or prioritized before v0.1.0? -->

<!-- What user, operator, or integration scenario is affected? -->
